---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

### Type of Issue

- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Unclear or confusing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect or outdated documentation
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue
- [ ] Code example doesn't work
- [ ] Other (please specify)

### Location

**File/Page**: [e.g., README.md, docs/api.md, line 42]
**URL** (if applicable): [e.g., https://docs.example.com/page]

### Current Documentation

<!-- Quote or describe the current documentation -->

```markdown
Current text or code example
```

### Issue Description

Describe what is wrong, missing, or unclear about the current documentation.

### Suggested Improvement

<!-- Provide your suggestion for how to improve the documentation -->

```markdown
Suggested new text or corrected example
```

### Why This Matters

Explain why this documentation improvement would be helpful (e.g., common user confusion, critical for new users, etc.).

### Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this documentation issue hasn't already been reported
- [ ] I have clearly identified the location of the issue
- [ ] I have explained what needs to be improved
- [ ] I have suggested a specific improvement (if applicable)
